runs.reply: Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing.
Why don't eggs tell jokes? Because they'd crack up everywhere!

Why did the scarecrow win an award?
Because he was outstanding in his field!

Cherry blossoms bloom,
Petal by petal they fall,
Spring's beauty unfurls.

Leaves turn red and gold,
Dancing in the autumn breeze,
Nature's symphony.

Serene mountain peak
Silhouetted against the stars
Nature's majestic gift

A simple summer's day,
Where sunbeams dance and play,
A gentle breeze caresses,
Whispering secrets soft and sweet,

The skies so azure blue,
Relax, let your mind wander too,
Nature's beauty surrounds us,
Joy and peace can be found,

Take time to breathe in,
The fresh and fragrant air,
Let your worries disappear,
As you touch down to earth,

Enjoy the warmth upon your skin,
Embrace the light within,
This is a moment to treasure,
A memory that will last,

A summer's day, so divine,
Fills hearts with love and light,
And reminds us of nature's gifts,
Bringing joy and peace, day and night.

Birds sing, flowers bloom,
Life takes its gentle forms,
In nature's every nook,
A symphony is formed.

From sun up 'til sundown,
Each moment's full of grace,
Joy and beauty overflow,
In God's perfect embrace.

So, let us take heart,
And lift our eyes to see,
The wonders waiting around,
As we walk life's mystery.

In the depths of night,
Where dark whispered secrets hide,
Amidst the shadows cast,
A tale of love unfolds.

Under the pale moonlight,
Lost in each other's eyes,
Hands entwined, hearts alight,
In this fleeting paradise.

Their words soft as the breeze,
An echo of their souls,
A bond that's hard to seize,
A love that never grows old.

In the silence of the night,
Their story takes flight,
A symphony of love's delight,
A tale worth telling time and again,
Of two hearts dancing under the stars,
In a moment that seems to last for ever,
A memory that will never fade,
A love that lives on in every page.

Life is a journey, filled with highs and lows, twists and turns. It's like riding a roller coaster - sometimes you're up in the air, screaming with excitement, and other times you're hanging on tight, ready for the next drop. But just like a roller coaster, the thrill of the ride makes it all worth it.
Life is a journey through a maze, with each decision serving as a turn that can lead you closer to your destination or further away from it.
Life is a beautiful dance, full of twists and turns, where we learn new steps and find our unique rhythm, all while sharing moments of joy and sorrow with those around us.
